text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway when suddenly
Agnes Tachyon calls out to me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, take a look at that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Can you see? At the end of the hallway... near the
landing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I squint my eyes to see a bit better...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Kehe... Keeheehee...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All my adorable Umas bustling up and down the
stairway!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Are those wings? Is that an angel? A real angel? It is an angel!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Do you see now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we're roommates. And she's quite the
intriguing person, to say the least.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For instance, she apparently enjoys observing
other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She notices even the slightest anomalies that I am
likely to overlook!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She'll mention things like, "Her step is shorter
than yesterday," or, "Her footsteps sound
different than usual!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe her observational skills?! She's
remarkable!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! You must convince her to work together
with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I—no, whenever an Umamusume
approaches her to talk, she tends to grow tense.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But if you're there, it might ease that tension.
Please, you must help me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp?! They just held hands! And the way they kept looking away and being all shy? Epic!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Look at the way their hands intertwined... They
totally touched fingertips, didn't they?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohmigosh! Is this heaven?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wowie! Super maximum excitement overload! I
can't even!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyawahhh?! Tachyon's trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And Tachyon, too! In the flesh! Ahhh, you're as
beautiful as you were this morning!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Do you have a moment? You see, I was hoping—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing enough just sharing a room together,
but now you're here approaching me outside!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhahabls! I'm so happy, I might be having a heart attack! Huff... puff... Wait a sec! I need some time to prepare!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold on! I haven't said what I...
choice_data_list:
Oh, looks like she's dropped her treasured
Umamusume scrapbook!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold on! I haven't said what I...
choice_data_list:
Oh, looks like she's dropped her treasured
Umamusume scrapbook!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, intriguing! So you like a challenge, do
you, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I will learn about those extraordinarily observant
eyes of yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon and I chase around the
overexcited Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I won't let you escape, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaao! Your rising tone and the way your ears
twitched when you said "escape!" This is love! I'm
in wuv!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We chase her for over an hour... Eventually, we
lose sight of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she was unable to make her request,
Agnes Tachyon seems to have learned something
from all the chasing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! Where is it?! Where is it?! Where's my
beloved Umamusume scrapbook?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Nice, Trainer! If we keep this up, we'll eventually
capture her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hroooaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon grabs Agnes Digital from behind
in a full nelson.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Waaaaah?! Is this the warm embrace of one of my
precious Umas?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What the... Her body temperature has rapidly
increased!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Digital helplessly collapses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we didn't manage to ask for her help,
but it seems like Agnes Tachyon was able to learn
something through the exchange.
